overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a historical action game showing a character in ancient Mediterranean attire walking along a wooden harbor dock and transitioning onto a cobblestone quay. The scene features detailed ancient sailing vessels, stone architecture, and harbor activity under bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow wooden harbor dock with stone seawall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wooden dock beside a tall stone seawall

entered.detail: tall weathered stone wall running along the left side of the dock
weathered wooden planks forming the walking surface of the pier
large ancient sailing vessel with curved hull and mast moored at the dock
tall wooden crane tower used for loading cargo onto ships
stone building with sloped roof at the top of the dock stairs

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow wooden dock flanked by a stone seawall on the left and moored ancient vessels on the right. A large wooden crane structure is visible ahead against the bright sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open wooden pier with moored vessels and harbor workers

events.description: character passes a fisherman standing on the dock looking out at the water

agents.ego_description: continuing along the dock past harbor workers and moored ships

notable_agents.action: fisherman standing on the dock edge looking out at the harbor

entered.detail: thick wooden post used for tying ships to the dock
mountain range visible across the harbor water in the distance

segments.scene_description: The dock opens up with full sky visibility as the character passes a fisherman standing by the water. The stone seawall recedes into the distance while wooden mooring posts and distant mountains come into view.

scene_state.functional_zone: cobblestone harbor quay with cargo carts and goods

events.description: character steps from wooden dock onto cobblestone harbor pavement

agents.ego_description: walking across the cobblestone quay examining the harbor goods and carts

notable_agents.action: child sitting on the ground near stacked textiles

entered.detail: irregular cobblestone pavement replacing the wooden dock planks
wooden cart with large wheels loaded with cargo containers
piles of colorful fabric cushions and cloth bundles
cylindrical rolled carpets stacked on the quay edge

segments.scene_description: The character transitions onto a wide cobblestone quay lined with cargo carts and stacked textiles. The wooden dock ends as the open harbor with distant sailing vessels expands into view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a narrow harbor dock that gradually opens into a wide, bustling cobblestone quay. It begins with the character walking between a stone seawall and moored ancient vessels, moving toward a large wooden crane structure silhouetted against the bright sky. As the character passes a fisherman by the water, the dock expands to reveal a broader view of wooden mooring posts and distant mountains. The scene then shifts as the wooden planks give way to a wide cobblestone quay lined with cargo carts and stacked textiles. Finally, the perspective opens fully to reveal the expansive harbor and distant sailing vessels under the midday sun.
